tickets.text: I was charged twice for my order. Please refund the duplicate.
My invoice shows the wrong amount. Can someone explain?
I cancelled my subscription but I am still being charged.
There is an extra fee on my bill I do not recognise.
My payment failed but money was deducted from my account.
I want to update my credit card details.
Why has my monthly price increased without any notice?
How do I get a VAT receipt for my recent purchase?
I was promised a discount but it has not been applied.
I paid my bill but my account still shows overdue.
I need to change my billing address on my account.
I was told the first month was free but I have been billed.
Where is my order? It was supposed to arrive yesterday.
I want to cancel my order as I no longer need the item.
Can I change the delivery address? I placed my order this morning.
My order has said processing for 5 days. Is something wrong?
I ordered two items but only one arrived.
My tracking number does not work on the courier website.
My order was marked as delivered but I never received it.
I received the wrong item. How do I get the correct one?
I accidentally placed the same order twice. Cancel the duplicate.
I need my order before Friday for a birthday.
My order was returned to sender even though I was home.
Which courier will be delivering my order?
I want to return a jacket I bought last week. It does not fit.
How long does a refund take to appear on my credit card?
I received a damaged product and I want a full refund.
I returned my order two weeks ago but have not received my refund.
Can I exchange this for a different colour instead of a refund?
What is your return policy for sale items?
I need a prepaid return label. How do I get one?
My refund was for the wrong amount. I paid more than returned.
Can I return an item after the 30-day return window?
The product stopped working after two weeks. Is this covered?
Can I get store credit instead of a refund to my card?
I want to return something received as a gift. Do I need a receipt?
I cannot log into my account. It says my password is wrong.
My account has been locked after too many login attempts.
I forgot my password and the reset email is not arriving.
Someone else has accessed my account. Lock it immediately.
I want to enable two-factor authentication.
My account shows as suspended. I have not violated any terms.
The verification code is not arriving by SMS.
I cannot access my account on my new phone.
I want to close my account and delete all my data under GDPR.
The magic link login is not working. The link says it has expired.
I want to change my email address on my account.
My username has been changed without my permission.
Your app keeps crashing when I try to open it on my iPhone.
The website is extremely slow and takes minutes to load.
I cannot complete checkout. It keeps failing at payment.
The mobile app is not syncing with the desktop version.
I am getting a session expired error even though I just logged in.
I cannot upload a file. It says the format is unsupported.
The notifications are not working on my Android device.
I cannot export my data. The download button does nothing.
I am getting a 500 error when I submit a form.
Your API is returning a 403 error with a valid API key.
The integration with my accounting software has stopped working.
I cannot print my invoice. The PDF appears corrupted.
Do you offer a student discount?
What are your customer support hours?
Do you ship to Ireland?
How long is your product warranty?
What is the difference between your basic and premium plans?
Do you offer a free trial?
Do you have a referral programme?
Do you offer bulk pricing for businesses?
Is your platform GDPR compliant?
Can I pay annually instead of monthly for a discount?
Do you provide an API for developers?
What languages is your platform available in?
My account has been hacked and money is being transferred out NOW.
URGENT: Our entire system is down. We are losing thousands per minute.
A fraudulent transaction was just made on my account. Freeze it.
Our business cannot operate. Platform has been down for 6 hours.
Customer data has been shared with the wrong user. GDPR breach.
All staff are locked out of the system. We cannot work.
Security vulnerability found. Customer card data may be exposed.
Production database is corrupted after your last update.
We have a live event in 1 hour and platform is unresponsive.
This is the 5th time contacting support with no resolution. Escalate.
Payment processor down. We cannot take any orders.
We are being actively attacked. Need security team NOW.
Your support team was fantastic. Sarah resolved my issue in minutes.
The new app update is much better than before. Great work.
Your website is hard to navigate. I spent 20 mins finding my order.
The checkout process is too long. Please reduce the steps.
I have been a customer 5 years and the service keeps improving.
Loading times on your mobile app are too slow.
The returns process was painless and refund came through quickly.
Please add dark mode to your app.
I suggested a feature 6 months ago and you built it. Thank you.
Fantastic service from start to finish. Will order again.
The automatic renewal is confusing. I did not know I would be charged.
Your live chat response times have improved. Keep it up.
